mood: hushed, nocturnal, optically staged, with a single rule-breaking aperture pulling the section off axis
lighting: dim interior dusk with a muted ochre window glow, cool gray shadow pooling at the lower edge, and no hard studio gloss
object_inventory: large off-axis viewing aperture held by dark vertical edges
abstract shadow mass dissolved into the wall field
low foreground block interrupting the lower right plane
thin rail and light-bar gestures receding through a shallow architectural section
small framed scuffs and speckled nodes embedded in plaster
negative_constraints: no legible words, signatures, filenames, numbers, UI labels, or source taxonomy in the image
no desks, dashboards, archive walls, shelves, cabinets, software mockups, or summary cards
do not copy identifiable portrait subject matter; translate the reference into shadow mass, window glow, edge behavior, and surface grain
avoid a repeated corridor/gate/pinlight composition; make the spatial premise a nocturnal viewing chamber or observatory cutaway
anchors must be visible surface interruptions, apertures, seams, strips, nodes, scuffs, or folded edges rather than floating cards
no equal-weight grid of source objects
no unrelated replacement image or metaphorical scene when a source image is attached
